input: Bug report from ai-agents PR #760 (paraphrased). The repo uses a deprecated pre-commit hook step called 'Skill Generation (BLOCKING)' that runs `Generate-Skills.ps1`. That script has been replaced upstream in SkillForge by `validate-skill.py`, which has different frontmatter requirements. Pre-commit passes locally because the deprecated script is permissive, but the upstream validator now rejects the same skills in CI. Five skills in `.claude/skills/` now fail validation. What is the smallest fix shape and how to prevent this drift class?
